name: VILLAGE SUPER MARKET INC
summary: Village Super Market, Inc. operates supermarkets under the ShopRite banner and Gourmet Garage specialty markets. The company sells center store products, fresh items, pharmacy products, and other goods. Headquartered in Springfield, New Jersey, it is a New Jersey corporation trading on NASDAQ under the ticker VLGEA. The company operates stores leased from related-party real estate partnerships and affiliated entities.
